document_summary: Email from Peking University Graduate School inviting Dehuan Liu to attend the Working Seminar and Project Approval Review of 'Comprehensive Reform of Doctoral Education' in 2019. Meeting scheduled March 5, 2019. Liu invited as an expert participant in doctoral education reform.

snippets.text: # Notice of Meeting: Working Seminar and Project Approval Review of "Comprehensive Reform of Doctoral Education" in 2019
snippets.subject: Meeting title: Doctoral Education Comprehensive Reform review
snippets.reasoning: Title of the meeting Liu was invited to attend as an expert reviewer.

snippets.subject: Email addressed to Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Confirms the meeting invitation was directed to Liu personally.

snippets.text: The Graduate School is going to hold the Working Seminar and Project Approval Review of "Comprehensive Reform of Doctoral Education" in 2019 on March 5 (next Tuesday) from 1:30 to 4:30 p.m. in the Talent Exchange Center Moonlight Hall. Please take time to attend the meeting.
snippets.subject: Liu invited to attend Doctoral Education reform seminar on March 5, 2019
snippets.reasoning: Specific invitation for Liu to attend the doctoral education reform seminar as an expert.

snippets.text: In order to innovate the talent training mechanism and accelerate the construction of world- class universities and world- class disciplines, the university launched the application of the project of "Deepening the Comprehensive Reform of Doctoral Education" last semester. The project aims to support schools and departments to actively explore the innovation of training mechanisms, and promote the establishment of unique process management systems, funding systems, curriculum systems, etc. at the school and department level. This meeting is not only a project approval review, but also a working seminar, focusing on the comprehensive reform of doctoral education, and carrying out experience exchange and opinions and suggestions collection from different levels such as functional departments, schools and departments, and experts.
snippets.subject: Context: world-class university construction, Liu invited as expert for project review
snippets.reasoning: Describes the meeting context and confirms Liu's role as expert participant in doctoral education reform.

relations.context: Graduate School invited Liu to attend doctoral education reform review meeting
